glosses.ja: テレビ; テレビ放送

translations.en: I like to watch TV in the evenings.
translations.es: Me gusta ver la tele por las noches.
translations.fr: J’aime regarder la télé le soir.
translations.it: Mi piace guardare la TV la sera.
translations.ko: 저는 저녁에 TV 보는 걸 좋아해요.
translations.pt: Gosto de ver televisão à noite.
translations.vi: Tôi thích xem tivi vào buổi tối.
translations.hi: मुझे शाम को टीवी देखना पसंद है।
translations.el: Μου αρέσει να βλέπω τηλεόραση τα βράδια.
translations.nb: Jeg liker å se på TV om kvelden.
translations.id: Saya suka menonton TV di malam hari.
translations.sv: Jag gillar att titta på tv på kvällarna.
translations.ro: Îmi place să mă uit la televizor seara.
translations.cs: Večer se rád dívám na televizi.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide at se tv om aftenen.
translations.ja: 夜はテレビを見るのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present tense 1st person singular (V2 position). Takes a direct object.
Temporal adverb indicating habitual time; modifies the verb.
Adverb of preference (‘gern(e) + Verb’ = ‘to like to’); modifies the verb.
Neuter mass noun meaning the medium/activity ‘television’; direct object (accusative) of ‘schaue’ and article-less due to mass-noun use.

sentences.target: Im Fernsehen kommt gleich der Film.

translations.de: Im Fernsehen kommt gleich der Film.
translations.en: The movie is on TV soon.
translations.es: La película empieza en la tele dentro de poco.
translations.fr: Le film commence bientôt à la télé.
translations.it: Il film sta per iniziare in TV.
translations.zh-Hans: 电影马上要在电视上播了。
translations.pt: O filme vai começar na televisão daqui a pouco.
translations.vi: Bộ phim sắp chiếu trên tivi.
translations.nl: De film begint straks op tv.
translations.hu: A film mindjárt kezdődik a tévében.
translations.hi: फ़िल्म जल्द ही टीवी पर शुरू होगी।
translations.pl: Zaraz w telewizji zacznie się film.
translations.el: Η ταινία ξεκινά σύντομα στην τηλεόραση.
translations.id: Filmnya sebentar lagi tayang di TV.
translations.cs: Film za chvíli začne v televizi.
translations.ja: もうすぐテレビで映画が始まります。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of ‘in dem’ (in + the, dative); introduces a prepositional phrase with dative.
Neuter noun ‘television’ (the medium). Object of the preposition (‘im Fernsehen’ ≈ ‘on TV’, dative).
Finite main verb, present tense 3rd person singular; verb-second position with a topicalized PP causes the subject to appear postverbally.
Temporal adverb meaning ‘in a moment/soon’; modifies the verb.
Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determines ‘Film’ (the subject).
Masculine noun; subject in nominative (‘der Film’) of ‘kommt’.

sentences.target: Das Fernsehen zeigt heute das Spiel live.
sentences.reading: /das ˈfɛʁnzeːən tsaɪ̯kt ˈhɔʏ̯tə das ʃpiːl laɪ̯f/

translations.de: Das Fernsehen zeigt heute das Spiel live.
translations.ipa: /das ˈfɛʁnzeːən tsaɪ̯kt ˈhɔʏ̯tə das ʃpiːl laɪ̯f/
translations.en: TV is showing the game live today.
translations.es: Hoy la tele emite el partido en directo.
translations.fr: La télé diffuse le match en direct aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi la TV trasmette la partita in diretta.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天电视直播这场比赛。
translations.yue: 今日電視直播呢場比賽。
translations.ru: Сегодня по телевизору матч показывают в прямом эфире.
translations.pt: Hoje a televisão transmite o jogo ao vivo.
translations.he: היום המשחק משודר בשידור חי בטלוויזיה.
translations.vi: Hôm nay trận đấu được phát trực tiếp trên tivi.
translations.ar: اليوم تُبث المباراة مباشرة على التلفاز.
translations.nl: Vandaag wordt de wedstrijd live uitgezonden op tv.
translations.uk: Сьогодні матч показують наживо по телебаченню.
translations.hu: Ma élőben közvetítik a meccset a tévében.
translations.hi: आज मैच टीवी पर लाइव दिखाया जा रहा है।
translations.pl: Dziś mecz jest transmitowany na żywo w telewizji.
translations.el: Σήμερα ο αγώνας μεταδίδεται ζωντανά στην τηλεόραση.
translations.nb: I dag sendes kampen direkte på TV.
translations.id: Hari ini pertandingan disiarkan langsung di TV.
translations.sv: I dag sänds matchen live på tv.
translations.ro: Astăzi meciul este transmis în direct la televizor.
translations.cs: Dnes se zápas vysílá živě v televizi.
translations.da: I dag bliver kampen sendt live på tv.
translations.ja: 今日は試合がテレビで生中継されます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative neuter singular; determines ‘Fernsehen’ (subject).
Neuter noun; subject referring to TV as an institution/medium.
Finite main verb, present tense 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Temporal adverb; situates the event in time.
Definite article, accusative/neuter singular; determines the direct object ‘Spiel’.
Neuter noun; direct object of ‘zeigt’.
Adverb (loanword) indicating manner of broadcast; modifies ‘zeigt’.

translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, il n’y a pas de télé.
translations.it: Oggi non si guarda la TV.
translations.nb: I dag ser vi ikke på TV.
translations.sv: I dag blir det ingen tv.
translations.ro: Astăzi nu ne uităm la televizor.
translations.da: I dag ser vi ikke tv.
translations.ja: 今日はテレビは見ません。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb placed in the prefield; sets the time frame.
Finite main verb, present tense 3rd person singular; used existentially in the impersonal construction ‘es gibt’ (‘there is/are’).
Impersonal/expletive pronoun used with ‘es gibt’.
Negative determiner; negates the noun phrase and agrees in case/number/gender (here accusative neuter singular).
Neuter mass noun; direct object of the existential construction ‘es gibt’ (accusative).
